task_name: Multi-segment surgical training facility tour and interviews
notes: This video is a broadcast/documentary compilation (CCTV+ production) featuring multiple surgical training scenarios, interviews with faculty and industry representatives, facility tours, and educational demonstrations. It is NOT a single FLS task performance and cannot be scored using FLS rubrics.

scoring_impossibility_explanation: This is a CCTV+ broadcast documentary featuring multiple surgical training facilities, expert interviews, equipment demonstrations, and brief glimpses of training scenarios. It is NOT formatted as an FLS task performance video. The framings, camera angles, and editorial cuts are designed for broadcast journalism, not FLS assessment. To score an FLS task, video must: (1) show a single continuous task attempt, (2) provide clear overhead or side views of the task field sufficient to measure deviations/penalties, (3) display elapsed time or timestamp throughout, (4) capture all phases without editorial cuts. This video lacks all of these properties.
recommendation: Reject for FLS scoring. If a specific FLS task performance is needed, request the isolated task video from the training facility, not the broadcast documentary.
